meaning: 雷诺萨[墨西哥东北部城市]
examples: McAllen sits across the border from Reynosa, a large manufacturing centre.
The products leave the loading dock in Reynosa, clear customs a few miles away at the border, then are immediately shipped to the client.
"I avoid the street at night, " he says of the unofficial curfew local residents adhere to in Reynosa.
BMW, Sony and Matsushita have set up maquiladoras in Reynosa and Matamoros.
Another U.S. client in the Reynosa area, the consultant says, has become concerned about firefights, limiting its hours of operations and building a safe room.
